Portfolio

Vue File Agent
Vue.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3

Vue.js file upload component with drag-and-drop, multi-file, and image preview support

A feature-rich Vue.js file upload component that supports drag-and-drop, multi-file uploads, image previews, and customizable theming. Released as open-source to the Vue community.

Rockplate
JavaScript, Node.js

Lightweight JavaScript template engine for Node.js and the browser

A fast, lightweight template engine for JavaScript with a focus on simplicity and performance. Designed to work seamlessly in both Node.js and browser environments.

POS System
PHP, Laravel, MySQL, JavaScript

Point-of-sale system used by 20+ businesses in Sri Lanka

Developed a comprehensive point-of-sale system deployed across 20+ businesses in Sri Lanka. Features included inventory management, billing, reporting, and credit payment processing.

Establishing and optimizing local LLM environments for AI-accelerated software engineering

React, Oracle Storefront Framework (OSF), Oracle Commerce Cloud (OCC)

Adsfly.lk
PHP, Laravel, MySQL, JavaScript

Sri Lanka-based classified ads marketplace platform

Co-founded and launched Adsfly.lk, a classified ads marketplace for the Sri Lankan market. Built the platform from the ground up, handling both frontend and backend development.
